reference: I am having pains in my upper torso, in the rib cage area. I am nauseated and have diarrhea. I had been on antibiotics, Augmentin, because of a cat scratch, so I know I probably have the diarrhea from those. However, I have felt so bad for the last week that I have been taking them. I took my last one on Saturday morning but came home last night feeling as sick as can be. It has not gotten any better today. I also am belching a lot, so I have taken Ranitidine for that. I don’t think it's my heart, but someone said it sounded like gallbladder? Help.
text: I am having pains in my upper torso in the rib cage area. I am nauseated and have diarrhea. I have been on antibiotics augmentin bactoscrach, so I know I probably have the diarrhea from those. However, I have felt so bad for the last week that I have been taking them. I took my last one on Saturday morning, but came home last night feeling as sick as can be. It has not gotten any better today. I also am belching a lot, so I have taken ranitidine for that. I don't think it's my heart, but someone said it sounded like gallbladder. Help.
